"Postgres query exectution error (DataError): (psycopg2.errors.InvalidDatetimeFormat) invalid value "T1" for "HH24"
DETAIL:  Value must be an integer.

[SQL: SELECT id, ownerid, createddate
FROM "Case"
WHERE TO_TIMESTAMP(createddate, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00';]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/9h9h)"

"There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters in the available data (casehistory__c has no 'Owner' changes since 2022-04-10), so it is not possible to identify an agent\u2019s transfer count over that period. As a result, no agent Id can be returned for this query."

args.answer: There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters in the available data (casehistory__c has no 'Owner' changes since 2022-04-10), so it is not possible to identify an agent’s transfer count over that period. As a result, no agent Id can be returned for this query.

val_args.answer: There are no owner transfer records in the last 4 quarters in the available data (casehistory__c has no 'Owner' changes since 2022-04-10), so it is not possible to identify an agent’s transfer count over that period. As a result, no agent Id can be returned for this query.
